title: Leader Zombie Full Health│領頭殭屍滿生命
description: Leader Zombie spawns with full health，Fix MC-219981。│領頭殭屍以滿血生成，修復 MC-219981。
body:
# Function│功能
- Leader zombies will have a high amount of health equal to their max health when spawned.│領頭殭屍生成時將擁有與其最大生命值一樣的高額生命值。
- Fixed [MC-219981](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-219981).│修復了[MC-219981](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-219981)。
